strengths: Demonstrated good instrument coordination and cutting technique throughout most of the circle
Maintained appropriate traction with the Maryland grasper during cutting phases
Showed efficient time management with completion in 116 seconds
weaknesses: Failed to complete the final separation of the circular piece from the gauze
Did not verify complete circle closure before ending the task
Incomplete task execution resulted in automatic zero score despite good technique

drills.name: Complete Circle Verification Drill
drills.description: Cut practice circles and pause before the final 10% to verify the starting point connection, then complete with deliberate overlap verification.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the final separation of the circular piece.

drills.name: Circle Closure Inspection Protocol
drills.description: After cutting any circle, use the Maryland to gently test if the piece separates completely before considering the task finished.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not verify complete circle closure before ending the task.

progression_note: At the advanced level, technical execution must be paired with meticulous task completion verification. The incomplete circle resulted in zero points despite otherwise competent cutting technique.
